ArtificialMovementParams.description: Parameters controlling synthetic motion applied to timelapse sequences.

movement_type.description: Synthetic motion model applied to the stack. Only 'translation' is currently supported.
movement_type.title: Movement Type

speed.description: Base movement speed in pixels per frame.
speed.title: Speed

direction.description: Movement direction. Use 'random' to sample directions dynamically.
direction.title: Direction

nFrames.description: Optional number of frames to move. Use null to use the full input sequence length.
nFrames.title: Nframes

dynamic_direction.description: Whether direction can change over time. Requires direction='random'.
dynamic_direction.title: Dynamic Direction

variable_speed.description: Whether movement speed can vary during the sequence.
variable_speed.title: Variable Speed

keep_center_fixed.description: Whether the effective crop should stay centered while movement is applied.
keep_center_fixed.title: Keep Center Fixed

keep_input_size.description: Whether the transformed output should preserve the original input size.
keep_input_size.title: Keep Input Size

ArtificialMovementParams.title: ArtificialMovementParams

patience.description: Number of non-improving epochs tolerated before stop.
patience.title: Patience

alpha.description: Weight applied to the edge-loss term in the CharEdge objective.
alpha.title: Alpha

DataNormalizationParams.description: Normalization coefficients consumed by the training data pipeline.

clip.description: Whether to clip low values before normalization. Use true to clip negatives to 0, or provide a numeric threshold.
clip.title: Clip

normSig2Obs.description: Whether to remap signal statistics to observation statistics for multi-noise paired datasets.
normSig2Obs.title: Normsig2Obs

normalize_data.description: Whether to normalize the loaded data using the provided observation and signal statistics.
normalize_data.title: Normalize Data

avgObs.description: Mean observation intensity used by the normalization pipeline.
avgObs.title: Avgobs

stdObs.description: Standard deviation of the observation intensities used by the normalization pipeline.
stdObs.title: Stdobs

avgSig.description: Mean signal intensity used when paired data normalization needs signal statistics.
avgSig.title: Avgsig

stdSig.description: Standard deviation of the signal intensities used when paired data normalization needs signal statistics.
stdSig.title: Stdsig

DataNormalizationParams.title: DataNormalizationParams

DownsamplingMultipleParams.description: Parameters specific to the 'multiple' downsampling method.

fill_factor.description: Fraction of pixels kept in each generated sparse observation, in the interval (0, 1].
fill_factor.title: Fill Factor

random.description: Whether each generated observation should use a random sparse sampling pattern.
random.title: Random

DownsamplingMultipleParams.title: DownsamplingMultipleParams

DownsamplingParams.description: Parameters controlling synthetic low-resolution input generation for upsampling training.

supervised_training.description: Whether the downsampled input is paired with a supervised target during training.
supervised_training.title: Supervised Training

downsamp_factor.description: Spatial downsampling factor applied to the input.
downsamp_factor.title: Downsamp Factor

downsamp_method.description: Downsampling strategy. Supported values are blur, multiple, random, real, and all.
downsamp_method.title: Downsamp Method

multiple_prm.description: Extra parameters used when downsamp_method is 'multiple'.

sampling_strategy.description: Explicit real-sampling positions as two rows: y indices then x indices.
sampling_strategy.title: Sampling Strategy

DownsamplingParams.title: DownsamplingParams

ExperimentDataSection.description: User-authored data-loading and preprocessing settings for a training run.

dataset_name.description: Dataset registry name used to resolve dataset metadata and canonical paths.
dataset_name.title: Dataset Name

canonical_load.description: Whether dataset paths should be resolved through the canonical project routing rules.
canonical_load.title: Canonical Load

prep_before.description: Whether configured preprocessing should be applied before patch extraction or batching.
prep_before.title: Prep Before

already_split.description: Whether the dataset already contains separate train/val/test splits on disk.
already_split.title: Already Split

paired.description: Whether each input sample is paired with an explicit target sample.
paired.title: Paired

input.description: Relative input subpath or key used to locate model inputs inside the dataset.
input.title: Input

target.description: Relative target or ground-truth subpath used for supervised training.
target.title: Target

inp.description: Legacy alias for input. Prefer using input in new configs.
inp.title: Inp

gt.description: Legacy alias for target. Prefer using target in new configs.
gt.title: Gt

data_format.description: Dataset format identifier, for example single, timelapse, or other loader-specific formats.
data_format.title: Data Format

filters.description: Filename extensions accepted when scanning dataset folders.
filters.title: Filters

batch_size.description: Mini-batch size used by the dataset loader.
batch_size.title: Batch Size

patch_size.description: Training patch size. Use null to train on full images or dataset-native crops.
patch_size.title: Patch Size

val_patch_size.description: Validation patch size. Use null to reuse patch_size or evaluate full images.
val_patch_size.title: Val Patch Size

patch_thresh.description: Optional threshold used by patch selection logic to keep informative patches only.
patch_thresh.title: Patch Thresh

select_on_gt.description: Whether patch selection should use the target image instead of the input image.
select_on_gt.title: Select On Gt

augmentation.description: Whether built-in data augmentation should be applied during training.
augmentation.title: Augmentation

initial_crop.description: Optional crop applied before patch extraction. Shape and meaning depend on the loader implementation.
initial_crop.title: Initial Crop

mltpl_noise.description: Whether the dataset contains multiple noise observations per sample.
mltpl_noise.title: Mltpl Noise

inp_transform.description: Optional transform configuration applied to the input before it is fed to the model.
inp_transform.title: Inp Transform

gt_transform.description: Optional transform configuration applied to the target or ground truth.
gt_transform.title: Gt Transform

timelapse_prm.description: Timelapse-specific loading options, used for temporal datasets.

mltpl_snr_prm.description: Multi-SNR selection options, used when a dataset contains several noise levels per sample.

downsampling.description: Upsampling-training settings for generating downsampled model inputs.

artificial_movement.description: Upsampling-training settings for adding synthetic motion to temporal inputs.

norm_prm.description: Optional normalization statistics or settings applied to the input data.
norm_prm.title: Norm Prm

model_norm_prm.description: Optional normalization settings specific to the model output space.
model_norm_prm.title: Model Norm Prm

avgObs_per_noise.description: Optional per-noise-level average observation values used by specialized normalization flows.
avgObs_per_noise.title: Avgobs Per Noise

stdObs_per_noise.description: Optional per-noise-level standard deviations used by specialized normalization flows.
stdObs_per_noise.title: Stdobs Per Noise

ExperimentDataSection.title: ExperimentDataSection

num_latents.description: Optional number of latent levels. Required when z_dims is provided as a single integer.
num_latents.title: Num Latents

z_dims.description: Latent dimensionality per level, either as one integer or an explicit list.
z_dims.title: Z Dims

color_ch.description: Number of image channels handled by LadderVAE.
color_ch.title: Color Ch

blocks_per_layer.description: Number of residual blocks per hierarchical layer.
blocks_per_layer.title: Blocks Per Layer

norm.description: Normalization type used inside LadderVAE residual blocks.
norm.title: Norm

batchnorm.description: Deprecated legacy toggle. If provided without `norm`, true maps to `norm='group'` and false maps to `norm=None`.
batchnorm.title: Batchnorm

stochastic_skip.description: Whether stochastic skip connections are enabled.
stochastic_skip.title: Stochastic Skip

n_filters.description: Feature-channel width used inside LadderVAE blocks.
n_filters.title: N Filters

dropout.description: Dropout probability used inside LadderVAE blocks.
dropout.title: Dropout

free_bits.description: Free-bits threshold applied to the KL term.
free_bits.title: Free Bits

learn_top_prior.description: Whether the top latent prior should be learned.
learn_top_prior.title: Learn Top Prior

gated.description: Whether gated residual blocks are enabled.
gated.title: Gated

no_initial_downscaling.description: Whether the initial convolution skips the first spatial downscaling step.
no_initial_downscaling.title: No Initial Downscaling

analytical_kl.description: Whether to use the analytical KL computation.
analytical_kl.title: Analytical Kl

mode_pred.description: Whether LadderVAE runs in prediction mode instead of training mode.
mode_pred.title: Mode Pred

use_uncond_mode_at.description: Latent levels where unconditional mode should be used.
use_uncond_mode_at.title: Use Uncond Mode At

LossFunctionConfig.description: Typed training loss configuration passed to the trainer.

name.description: Loss function name. Supported values are MSE/L2, MAE/L1, CharEdge_loss, CharEdge, and MSE_upsampling.
name.title: Name

CharEdge_loss_prm.description: Parameter block required when using CharEdge_loss or CharEdge.

MSE_upsampling_prm.description: Parameter block required when using MSE_upsampling.

LossFunctionConfig.title: LossFunctionConfig

MSEUpsamplingLossParams.description: Parameters for the custom upsampling-aware MSE loss.

upsampling_factor.description: Upsampling factor used by the custom loss. The current implementation only supports a factor of 2.
upsampling_factor.title: Upsampling Factor

alpha.description: Weight applied to the custom sub-pixel consistency term, in the interval [0, 1).
alpha.title: Alpha

MSEUpsamplingLossParams.title: MSEUpsamplingLossParams

MultipleSnrParams.description: Options used when selecting a noise level from multi-SNR datasets.

snr_idx.description: Noise level selection strategy: a single index, a list of indices, 'last', 'random', or null.
snr_idx.title: Snr Idx

MultipleSnrParams.title: MultipleSnrParams

name.description: Registered noise-model name to attach to the experiment. Use null to disable it.
name.title: Name

NormalizationSection.description: Training normalization settings resolved before data loading.

load_from_noise_model.description: Whether Stage A normalization metadata should be loaded automatically from the configured noise model.
load_from_noise_model.title: Load From Noise Model

norm_prm.description: Explicit normalization parameters consumed by the data-loading pipeline.

NormalizationSection.title: NormalizationSection

RCANBackboneParams.description: Typed backbone parameters for RCAN blocks embedded in larger architectures.

in_channels.description: Number of input channels. When omitted inside UNet-RCAN, it is derived automatically.
in_channels.title: In Channels

out_channels.description: Number of output channels produced by RCAN.
out_channels.title: Out Channels

num_features.description: Feature-channel width used inside the RCAN body.
num_features.title: Num Features

num_rcab.description: Number of RCAB blocks per residual group.
num_rcab.title: Num Rcab

dropout.description: Dropout probability used inside RCAN residual blocks.
dropout.title: Dropout

upsamp_kernel_factor.description: Extra multiplier applied to the transposed-convolution kernel when RCAN performs upsampling.
upsamp_kernel_factor.title: Upsamp Kernel Factor

upsampling_method.description: RCAN upsampling method when standalone or when UNet-RCAN delegates upsampling to RCAN.
upsampling_method.title: Upsampling Method

RCANBackboneParams.title: RCANBackboneParams

RCANModelSection.description: Typed model section for the standalone RCAN architecture.
RCANModelSection.title: RCANModelSection

RCANParams.description: Typed constructor parameters for the standalone RCAN model.

in_channels.description: Number of input channels expected by the standalone RCAN model.
in_channels.title: In Channels

out_channels.description: Number of output channels produced by RCAN.
out_channels.title: Out Channels

num_features.description: Feature-channel width used inside the RCAN body.
num_features.title: Num Features

num_rcab.description: Number of RCAB blocks per residual group.
num_rcab.title: Num Rcab

dropout.description: Dropout probability used inside RCAN residual blocks.
dropout.title: Dropout

upsamp_kernel_factor.description: Extra multiplier applied to the transposed-convolution kernel when RCAN performs upsampling.
upsamp_kernel_factor.title: Upsamp Kernel Factor

upsampling_method.description: RCAN upsampling method when standalone or when UNet-RCAN delegates upsampling to RCAN.
upsampling_method.title: Upsampling Method

upsamp.description: Optional standalone upsampling factor performed by RCAN.
upsamp.title: Upsamp

upsamp_stride.description: Stride used by the RCAN upsampling block when upsamp is enabled.
upsamp_stride.title: Upsamp Stride

RCANParams.title: RCANParams

RoutingSection.description: Subfolder routing used to place datasets, checkpoints, logs, and inference outputs.

data_subfolder.description: Dataset subfolder selected under the configured data root.
data_subfolder.title: Data Subfolder

models_subfolder.description: Subfolder under the models root where checkpoints and training artifacts are stored.
models_subfolder.title: Models Subfolder

tensorboard_subfolder.description: Subfolder under the tensorboard root. Defaults to the models_subfolder when omitted.
tensorboard_subfolder.title: Tensorboard Subfolder

inference_subfolder.description: Subfolder under the inference root where evaluation or apply outputs are written.
inference_subfolder.title: Inference Subfolder

RoutingSection.title: RoutingSection

enabled.description: Whether checkpoints and other training artifacts should be written to disk.
enabled.title: Enabled

canonical_save.description: Whether checkpoint/output paths should be resolved through the canonical project routing rules.
canonical_save.title: Canonical Save

validation_images.description: Whether to save validation image previews during training.
validation_images.title: Validation Images

validation_freq.description: Number of epochs between validation-image saves.
validation_freq.title: Validation Freq

state_dict.description: Whether checkpoints should be saved as state_dict files.
state_dict.title: State Dict

entire_model.description: Whether checkpoints should be saved as serialized full-model files.
entire_model.title: Entire Model

overwrite_best.description: Whether the current best checkpoint may overwrite the previously saved best checkpoint.
overwrite_best.title: Overwrite Best

enabled.description: Whether TensorBoard summaries should be written during training.
enabled.title: Enabled

TimelapseParams.description: Options used when loading timelapse datasets.

timelapse_max_frames.description: Optional maximum number of frames to load from each timelapse stack.
timelapse_max_frames.title: Timelapse Max Frames

context_length.description: Odd temporal window size centered on the current frame. Use null to keep the full sequence.
context_length.title: Context Length

shuffle.description: Whether timelapse frames should be shuffled before sampling.
shuffle.title: Shuffle

sampling_seed.description: Base seed used to deterministically sample timelapse frames when shuffling is enabled. The effective per-file seed is derived from this base seed and a stable timelapse identifier.
sampling_seed.title: Sampling Seed

TimelapseParams.title: TimelapseParams

TrainExperimentSection.description: Experiment metadata for a fresh training run that creates a new run directory.

mode.description: Launch a fresh training run with an explicitly configured model and dataset.
mode.title: Mode

exp_name.description: Experiment name used to create the output run directory and derived artifact names.
exp_name.title: Exp Name

overwrite.description: Whether an existing experiment directory with the same name may be overwritten.
overwrite.title: Overwrite

post_training_inference.description: Whether to trigger automatic post-training evaluation when training completes or stops early.
post_training_inference.title: Post Training Inference

TrainExperimentSection.title: TrainExperimentSection

TrainingSection.description: Core optimization settings for the training loop.

n_epochs.description: Maximum number of training epochs to run.
n_epochs.title: N Epochs

batch_size.description: Fallback batch size used by the trainer when the data section does not provide one.
batch_size.title: Batch Size

learning_rate.description: Initial learning rate passed to the optimizer.
learning_rate.title: Learning Rate

optimizer.description: Optimizer name used to update the model parameters.
optimizer.title: Optimizer

scheduler.description: Optional learning-rate scheduler. Use a string name (legacy) or an object with `name` plus scheduler kwargs.
scheduler.title: Scheduler

progress_bar.description: Whether to show a live progress bar during training iterations.
progress_bar.title: Progress Bar

early_stop.description: Legacy debug-stop flag. Keeps historical truncated-training behavior for backward compatibility.
early_stop.title: Early Stop

debug_stop.description: Debug helper: when true, stop after 3 full epochs.
debug_stop.title: Debug Stop

pos_encod.description: Whether positional encoding should be enabled for models that support it.
pos_encod.title: Pos Encod

max_grad_norm.description: To clip grad norm value. Set to None to disable gradient clipping.
max_grad_norm.title: Max Grad Norm

warmup.description: Optional optimizer-step warmup. Active only when scheduler is ReduceLROnPlateau.

TrainingSection.title: TrainingSection

UNet3DModelSection.description: Typed model section for the standalone 3D U-Net architecture.

parameters.description: Typed constructor parameters for the standalone 3D U-Net model.

UNet3DModelSection.title: UNet3DModelSection

UNet3DParams.description: Typed constructor parameters for the 3D U-Net model.

feat.description: Base number of feature channels in the first encoder level.
feat.title: Feat

depth.description: Number of encoder/decoder levels in the 3D U-Net.
depth.title: Depth

in_channels.description: Number of input channels expected by the model.
in_channels.title: In Channels

out_channels.description: Number of output channels produced by the model.
out_channels.title: Out Channels

activation.description: Activation function used inside the convolutional blocks.
activation.title: Activation

norm.description: Normalization type used in the convolutional blocks.
norm.title: Norm

dropout.description: Dropout probability used inside convolutional blocks.
dropout.title: Dropout

upsampling_factor.description: Spatial upsampling factor applied by the standalone 3D U-Net.
upsampling_factor.title: Upsampling Factor

upsampling_order.description: Whether standalone upsampling happens before or after the 3D U-Net body. Required when upsampling_factor > 1.
upsampling_order.title: Upsampling Order

upsampling_method.description: Standalone upsampling method used when upsampling_factor > 1.
upsampling_method.title: Upsampling Method

remove_skip_con.description: Number of last skip connections to remove. 0 keeps all skip connections.
remove_skip_con.title: Remove Skip Con

cab_skip_con.description: Whether CAB skip connections should be used instead of plain skip connections. Accepted for configuration but not implemented yet.
cab_skip_con.title: Cab Skip Con

UNet3DParams.title: UNet3DParams

upsampling_net.title: Upsampling Net

upsampling_factor.description: Global upsampling factor performed by the hybrid model.

UNet_prm.description: Typed U-Net backbone parameters used inside the hybrid model.

steps.description: Number of optimizer steps used for warmup.

start_factor.description: Initial LR factor relative to base LR at warmup start.

description: User-authored schema for a fresh training experiment.

experiment.description: High-level metadata for a fresh training run.

routing.description: Subfolder routing that determines where data, models, logs, and inference outputs live.

data.description: User-authored data-loading, patching, and preprocessing settings.

model.description: Model architecture selection and typed constructor parameters.
model.title: Model

normalization.description: Dataset normalization settings applied before or during data loading.

model_norm_prm.description: Optional model-output normalization settings kept separate from the main data normalization block.
model_norm_prm.title: Model Norm Prm

loss_function.description: Typed loss-function configuration used to instantiate the trainer loss.

noise_model.description: Optional noise-model configuration or shortcut name.
